message:
web: Rewrite landing page from scratch

Build a fresh landing page from content alone — completely different
structure and design approach:

- Centered hero with agent icons in a row, not inline in heading
- Alternating left/right feature rows with images, not 3-col cards
- Single-column FAQ with native <details> elements
- Centered CTA section
- Compact footer with links and social in one row
- Uses existing design tokens (bg-background, text-foreground, etc.)
- Uses font-display (Instrument Serif) for headings
- Self-contained routes, no shared landing component file
- Remove olive color palette from CSS (was for oatmeal)

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/rqh81xp1jc3nvy2pvul6ycfk
